lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass "E:\Chattanooga biking\Chattanooga MapBox\Current files on Map Box\Uncompressed files\Godsey Waldens Connection" "Godsey Waldens Connection" Polyline # No Yes "GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],VERTCS["EGM96_Geoid",VDATUM["EGM96_Geoid"],PARAMETER["Vertical_Shift",0.0],PARAMETER["Direction",1.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-400 -400 1000000000;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;8.98315284119521E-09;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 "Godsey Waldens Connection" "Same as template"
